texto: See, the world is narrowing. We each live in a bubble of attitude. Everything tailored for us. No happenstance, only what I already am and know. At a certain point I find my shape is less here.' A palm flat on his chest. 'More out there.' Laying the palm on his keyboard.
explicacao: Citação de Matthew Blakstad sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “See, the world is narrowing. We each live in a bubble of attitude. Everything tailored for us. No…” articula sucesso, identity, society em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como society e technology.
